title: Viewer uses overview dashboard plus graph workspace
summary: Viewer now uses a Repowise style split: an overview dashboard first, then a dedicated graph workspace. The dashboard should summarize readiness, memory coverage, graph health, risk, review, and workspace links from exist
body: Viewer now uses a Repowise-style split: an overview dashboard first, then a dedicated graph workspace. The dashboard should summarize readiness, memory coverage, graph health, risk, review, and workspace links from existing graph/metrics/report artifacts; graph controls and deep inspection remain in the graph section drawer so the UI does not cram every panel onto one page.
